query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph showing a pink organic form, possibly a human face or body part, visible behind a translucent, textured barrier covered in fine scratches, droplets, and crystalline patterns. The upper portion of the frame fades into deep shadow, while the lower area transitions to pale blue-grey tones. A dark reddish circular shape appears on the left, partially visible through the glossy, irregular surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal, abstract photograph of a distorted pink figure pressed against a frozen, wet translucent barrier, rendered with intentional blur and smeared detail that dissolves the subject into ambiguity. The composition evokes atmospheric distress through its oppressive, low-contrast tonality—heavy crushed blacks and muted blues—creating a dreamlike, claustrophobic vision where the figure's features disappear beneath streaks of ice, scratches, and shadow.
